project.title: Arabidopsis meiotic-specific recombinase DMC1 IP-MS
project.projectDescription: To search for regulators of DMC1 stability, we generated DMC1-FLAG transgenic Arabidopsis plants and conducted immunoprecipitation-mass spectrometry (IP-MS) assay. 6,477 peptides corresponding to 2309 proteins were identified and 1009 proteins remained after removing background interactions using plants transformed with the corresponding empty vector (FLAG). GO term analysis was performed with the obtained data and revealed that ubiquitin proteasome pathway components are significantly enriched among the candidate proteins.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: The FASP digestion was adapted in Microcon PL-10 filters. After three-time buffer displacement (8 M Urea and 100 mM Tris-HCl, pH 8.5), proteins were reduced by 10 mM DTT at 37 °C for 30 min, and followed by alkylation with 30 mM iodoacetamide at 25 °C for 45 min in dark. Then three-time buffer displacement was performed to the sample with digestion buffer (30 mM Tris-HCl, pH 8.0). Trypsin (enzyme : protein as 1 : 50) was used for the digestion at 37 °C for 12 h. The solution was filtrated out after digestion and the filter was washed twice with 15% ACN. All the filtrates were pooled and vacuum-dried.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The results were processed with Arabidopsis database TAIR (32790 entries, 201307) and the Proteome Discoverer (v1.4, Thermo Fisher Scientific) with Mascot (v2.7, Matrix Science). The mass tolerances were 10 ppm for precursor and fragment Mass Tolerance 0.05 Da, respectively. Up to two missed cleavages were permitted. The carbamidomethylation on cysteine as a fixed modification, and acetylation on the N-terminal of protein and oxidation on methionine as variable modifications.

Comment[Instrument]: nanoflow EASY-nLC 1200 system (Thermo Fisher Scientific) coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
Comment[AcquisitionMethod]: one MS scan followed by sequential HCD-MS/MS acquisitions with a cycle time of 3 s
Comment[Separation]: in-house packed C18 columns (75 μm i.d. × ~20 cm; 1.9 μm, ReproSil-Pur 120 C18-AQ, Dr. Maisch GmbH)
Comment[GradientTime]: 5–8% B in 3 min, 8–44% B in 45 min, 44–100% B in 2 min, and 100% B for 10 min
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages]: up to four missed cleavage sites were allowed
Comment[EnrichmentMethod]: anti-FLAG magnetic beads, anti-GFP magnetic beads, or TUBE2 agarose beads (Life Sensors, UM402)
